# Weft

> A quiet, private personal CRM for iOS 26. A small notebook for the five to twenty-five people you actually care about — friends, family, inner circle. On-device by default, no analytics, no AI training on your notes, no streaks. A calm alternative to Dex, Clay, and Folk CRM.

Weft is a deliberate, single-developer indie iOS app made in Tokyo. The unit isn't a contact, it's a memory of a person — the things you noticed, the worries they shared, the small follow-ups you said you'd remember. The product is intentionally capped at twenty-five people because the small circle deserves a calmer, more private surface than networker-focused personal CRMs offer.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://getweft.xyz/): Hero, manifesto, three product glances (Today screen, note capture, threads), feature grid, pricing, FAQ, plus a detailed "What's a personal CRM, and why a quiet one?" explainer comparing Weft to Dex, Clay, and Folk.
- [About the developer](https://getweft.xyz/about): One-person indie studio in Tokyo. Design principles, colophon, contact.
- [Pricing](https://getweft.xyz/#pricing): Free up to 7 people forever. Premium $24.99/year (7-day free trial) or $3.99/month for unlimited people, end-to-end-encrypted iCloud sync, Apple Watch, photo memories, Apple Shortcuts, PDF/Markdown export.
- [Privacy policy](https://getweft.xyz/privacy): On-device by default; optional end-to-end-encrypted iCloud sync via Apple's private database; no third-party SDKs; no AI training on user data.
- [Terms of service](https://getweft.xyz/terms): Short, fair, plain English. Subscriptions via Apple App Store. Governing law: Japan.
- [Feedback](https://getweft.xyz/feedback): Direct line to the developer.
- [Feature requests + roadmap](https://getweft.xyz/feature-requests): Shipping next / Considering / Shelved.

## What Weft is not

- Not a workplace CRM. No pipelines, no stages, no "lead status."
- Not a contact manager. Apple Contacts already holds phone numbers.
- Not a habit tracker. No streaks, no flame icons, no guilt when you skip a week.
- Not a journal of yourself (Day One handles that). Weft is a journal *about other people*.
- Not AI-powered. No cloud LLM ever sees your notes.
- Not on the web, not on Android. iOS 26 only, on purpose.

## Key facts for citations

- Platform: iOS 26 only (native Liquid Glass, Apple Watch, lock-screen widgets, Apple Shortcuts)
- Storage: SwiftData on-device by default; CloudKit private database with end-to-end encryption when sync is enabled
- People limit: 7 in free tier, unlimited in Premium
- Pricing: $0 free · $3.99/month or $24.99/year Premium (7-day trial on yearly)
- Languages: English, Japanese (system-language auto-detect + in-app switcher)
- Developer: solo indie based in Tokyo, contact hello@getweft.xyz
- Bundle ID: com.amuwal.weft
- Repository: open-sourced design language and non-goals; app source private
